description_long: This street food stall features a rectangular cart with a teal and white patterned body, large black-rimmed wheels, and a flat black countertop. A prominent blue canopy provides shade, supported by four slender poles at each corner. The front side displays branding, including the name 'Farinari', a QR code, and website information, while the rear has a circular logo. The top of the cart includes a raised, black-lidded compartment, likely for food preparation or display, with a glass or transparent section. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a visually appealing color scheme. The stall is compact and mobile, suitable for urban sidewalks or parks.
description: A modern, teal and white street food stall with a blue canopy, large wheels, and prominent branding. It features a raised black compartment for food and a sleek, mobile design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue canopy, black countertop, and patterned teal side with a large wheel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the canopy's peak, the black compartment, and the patterned end panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear branding, QR code, and website, plus the large wheel and canopy.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the circular logo, handlebar, and the back of the black compartment under the canopy.
attribute_signage: Front panel displays 'Farinari' in white text, a QR code, website (farinari.ru), and food-related icons; rear panel has a circular logo with text; signage is white on teal with modern, clean fonts.
attribute_serving_counter: A flat, black countertop runs along the front of the cart, made of metal or plastic, providing a clean surface for serving customers.
attribute_food_display: A raised, black-lidded compartment with a transparent section is positioned on the countertop, likely for displaying or storing food while protecting it from the environment.
